name: Robert Cartwright

contactInfo.office: 122 N. Harrison St., San Augustine, TX 75972

bio: Robert Cartwright serves as the San Augustine County Sheriff, overseeing law enforcement in one of the oldest counties in Texas from the county seat of San Augustine. Sheriff Cartwright is devoted to serving and protecting this historic deep East Texas community.
campaignPromises: Provide consistent patrol coverage across San Augustine County
Protect Sam Rayburn Reservoir communities from property crime
Maintain professional standards in all department operations
Enhance emergency preparedness for severe weather events
Support local volunteer fire departments with coordination resources
